ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso2" TEXT /* 2-letter ISO code for the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "city_upper" TEXT /* City name in uppercase */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the city in meters */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the city */,
  "metropolitan_area" REAL /* Metropolitan area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date when the city was founded */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the city is located */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the administrative region where the city is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES administrative_regions ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrative_regions" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrative region */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrative region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the administrative region in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the administrative region */,
  "administrative_capital" TEXT /* Administrative capital of the administrative region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the administrative region is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_capitals" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital status of the city (admin or None) */,
  "capital_type" TEXT /* Type of capital (national, regional, or both) */,
  "capital_since" TEXT /* Date when the city became a capital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "population" REAL /* Total population of the city */,
  "population_proper" REAL /* Population of the city proper (excluding metropolitan area) */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the city in people per square kilometer */,
  "urban_population" INTEGER /* Urban population of the city */,
  "rural_population" INTEGER /* Rural population of the city */,
  "last_census_date" TEXT /* Date of the last census */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, organization) */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Expertise of the user (e.g., demographics, geography) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "permission_category" TEXT /* Category of the permission (e.g., data access, content creation) */,
  "permission_granted_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the data */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  "access_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of access (e.g., research, education) */,
  "user_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table to which the rule applies */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column to which the rule applies */,
  "rule" TEXT /* Validation rule (e.g., NOT NULL, UNIQUE) */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of validation rule (e.g., data type, range check) */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the validation rule */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city whose data was validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was validated */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the validation failed */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Error code if the validation failed */,
  "validated_by" TEXT /* User who performed the validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_logs_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES data_validation ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_logs_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city whose data was versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was versioned */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
